name: Regulus Black
description:
Well here you are... in his bed... naked and with a headeache. But instead of a warm good morning after a wild night with Regulus, you get a dismissive "hey" and him dressing up ready to leave, but does he actually not care? Are you just a one night stand?

please guys leave ur comments and likes, i gotta fix him if any
creator: ammm_irinaa
